contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: SPCX white-label, crypto cleanup, and Agroverse inventory sync
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/16
  
  Details:
  1. Confirmed SPCX = Space Exploration Technologies Corp. via EODHD search API. Updated company name from stale 'The Spac and New Issue ETF' and set white_listed=true in sentiment_importer production DB. Queued company:refresh_fundamentals_for[SPCX] Sidekiq job.
  
  2. Identified 15,144 crypto junk companies (stock_symbol LIKE '%-%' with no exchange) polluting the sentiment_importer database. Enqueued BatchCompanyCleanupWorker jobs via Sidekiq push_bulk to delete them and all associated daily_trades, key_statistics, balance_sheets, etc.
  
  3. Investigated Agroverse inventory sync architecture. Found the GAS webapp's doGet handler is missing the recalculateAndPublishInventory action, meaning event-triggered snapshot publishing was broken. Ran sync_agroverse_store_inventory.py --execute directly to refresh inventory JSONs. Current inventory: 6 units across 3 SKUs.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
